caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, a striped tie, and a dark suit jacket speaks into a handheld microphone. He is seated in an auditorium or conference setting, surrounded by other attendees. To his left, a woman with blonde hair wearing glasses and a light-colored blazer sits behind a laptop featuring a white Apple logo. Behind them, other people are seated, including a woman in a dark jacket with a patterned top. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, gesturing with his left hand to emphasize his points. His hand moves from a closed position near his chest to an open, expressive gesture. The other people in the background remain largely stationary, watching him speak. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and the focus remains on the man as the primary subject of the action.
